description: Per-page rich SEO content enrichment progress for the unified-tracking documentation site. Resumable across sessions. This is meta JSON, not Docusaurus content (the docs plugin ignores non-md files).

nextBatchSuggestion.rationale: Initial doc set (18 pages) is written and each page carries a definition-first intro, distinct title + meta description, and honest framing. Future long-tail batches: add per-provider how-to recipes (e.g. 'Send GA4 ecommerce events', 'Mask inputs in PostHog session replay'), framework integration guides (Next.js, Vite, Remix), and migration guides (from raw Segment/Sentry SDKs).

perBatch: Pick the next topic cluster from nextBatchSuggestion.candidateTopics.
Write the page(s) with definition-first intro, distinct title + 140-160 char meta, 5-8 FAQ where relevant, honest limit-framing.
Wire into sidebars.ts. yarn build + yarn typecheck clean.
Update this tracker. ONE commit per batch.
